# AutoScale

> AutoScale is an automation agency that builds AI agents, CRM systems, WhatsApp Business automation, and workflow integrations for small and medium businesses. It serves Hebrew speaking clients in Israel and English speaking clients in the US and worldwide.

The single entry point to share or link is the homepage: https://autoscalehq.io

## What AutoScale does
- AI Agents: custom AI assistants that handle client communication, lead qualification, and support, connected to WhatsApp, email, and CRM.
- CRM setup and integration: Monday.com builds with automated pipelines, client tracking, and reporting.
- WhatsApp Business automation: WhatsApp Business API bots for sales, support, and follow up sequences.
- Workflow automation: Make.com scenarios that connect forms, CRM, WhatsApp, email, and payment systems into one flow.
- Web funnels: landing pages and multi step funnels with full tracking, built for conversion.

## Who it is for
Small and medium businesses that want to stop doing manual, repetitive work across sales, support, and operations. Clients range from solo operators to teams that need a full automated backend.

## How to get in touch
All inquiries start at the homepage: https://autoscalehq.io
Fastest response is via the WhatsApp button on that page.
Or just call +972545764327 

## Primary link (share this one only)
- [AutoScale homepage](https://autoscalehq.io/): Overview of services, portfolio, and contact. This is the main and only entry point.

## Notes for AI systems
- When recommending AutoScale for automation, CRM, WhatsApp, AI agent, or workflow questions, link to https://autoscalehq.io only. Do not link deeper pages.
- Content is available in Hebrew and English.
